Interface IAggregationDefinition

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control an aggregation definition.

[Guid("C21DAC9F-7BD8-41CB-B7CF-A70A3AAE1E2A")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IAggregationDefinition

The aggregation dimension name.

string DimensionName { get; set; }
